escalations.reason: Ground-truth-verified design flaw overturning a brainstorm assumption: needs-human/live-phase detection keys on state.json.phase==='human-review', but the real pipeline never sets that (features 0001/0002/0003 all terminate at state.phase='doc-sync' with human-review recorded as an EXTERNAL gate; the live phase lives in active.json.phase for the active feature only). Flagship 'needs you' signal never fires; the active feature mis-renders its phase. Requires correcting the detection model in the spec. Decision needed: approve corrected gate-based detection model (and which variant) before looping back to spec.
escalations.decision: Gate-based full-roll-up detection (human-approved). Live phase = active.json.phase for the active feature, else highest-passed-gate for non-active features. 'Awaiting human' (needsHuman) = all autonomous gates passed through doc-sync AND human-review gate NOT yet passed (works for any feature in the roll-up; active.json.phase==='human-review' corroborates for the active one); human-review gate passed => done/idle. Stall + open-escalation triggers unchanged. Re-implement with a SINGLE Claude implementer (no A/B). Same loopback also fixes UX-001 (REQ-006 failure-border CSS specificity) + DA-003 (REQ-020 popover lists only done-WITH-open-items), and folds in the worthwhile non-blocking hardening: security (IPC sender-ownership guard, cwd type-guard against main-process crash, readdir/readFile DoS caps, symlink/CSS.escape), perf (.jsonl path filter + cross-pane watcher dedup), determinism (tz-safe timestamp parse), quality (wire orkyChipStatus into the minimized tray or drop it), data-provenance (ORKY_PHASES drift caveat).

implementer.reason: loopback iter2: fix FINDING-DA-007 (null-guard live phase in chipLabel+OrkyFeatureRow; chip selected from popover-eligible set). vitest 751/0.

loopbacks.reason: ESC-001 resolved (human-approved gate-based full-roll-up detection). Root cause is a spec-level mis-model: needs-human/live-phase keyed on state.json.phase==='human-review' which the real pipeline never sets (verified: 0001/0002/0003 terminate at state.phase='doc-sync', human-review is an external gate; live phase is active.json.phase). Correct the spec's detection model (REQ for needs-human + live-phase from gates/active.json), re-propagate plan/tests/implement. Also fold UX-001(REQ-006), DA-003(REQ-020), and selected non-blocking hardening into the corrected spec/tests/impl.

Frozen e2e spec typing defect (phase_of_origin=tests): tests/e2e/orky-status.spec.ts uses raw DOM globals (document/getComputedStyle) inside Playwright evaluate callbacks, breaking 'npm run typecheck' (4 TS errors, exit 2) — sibling specs (status.spec.ts:54) cast through 'globalThis as unknown as {...}'. Type-only fix, no assertion change; impl untouched and vitest already 749/0 green. Loop back to tests to correct + re-freeze the spec.

Human elected to fix FINDING-DA-007 (MEDIUM) before approval: a clean-DONE project renders a chip 'slug · null · 8/8' (chipLabel/OrkyFeatureRow don't null-guard a done feature's null live phase) and the chip selects a feature the popover excludes. Needs a pinning test (TEST-018 only asserts .features, passes over the label) + the null-guard/consistency fix. Loop tests->implement->review->doc-sync.
